metadata.description: Product Blueprint — a planning-first harness that turns an idea into an evidence-linked PRD, product flows, and a visual-design brief, with visual production available separately.

plugins.name: product-blueprint
plugins.description: Guided product-planning harness: compared concepts, brand direction, evidence-linked review, recorded user gates, confirmed product definition, complete screen and service flows, and a clear design brief. Visual design is optional and separately gated.
